review_title: Google One is Worth Every Penny
description: Google One has been a fantastic and easy to set-up offering that has allowed me to feel more confident in my backups. Not only do I have local and other cloud backups, but I am able to have a redundancy for relatively little money, allowing me to access the documents wherever I am, one whatever device I am using.
author: Nicholas D.
pros: I love how affordable extra storage is, on both a personal and professional level. It's easy to use, just sign up, pay a little bit, and you have extra back-up storage space. It has easy file management, allowing you to sort folders, documents, sheets, images, and more easily, with no difficulty finding them. I'm able to use it with my phone, my personal PC, my work PC, and my work phone. And sharing files couldn't be easier with the 'share' button.
cons: Customer support could be a bit more responsive, but it's not terrible. Just took a little longer than I'd like to have gotten an answer I needed in the beginning of the setup process.

review_title: Time Saver
description: I am glad to have something that breaks down my storage into groups like trash, spam, large videos and files. I can easily choose which clean up service I want to do. Easy for anyone to understand and use.
author: SHERREE H.
pros: Can see my storage that is used and what I have left. You can click to clean up things taking up storage but seeing what Google 1 suggests. They let you know before deleting stuff in folders that it will be permanently gone so to save you from deleting what you want to keep . Can see unsupported videos in your storage.
cons: I have experienced any problems at this time with Google 1. I don't have any negative views of this app.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Better than Icloud, great for students
description: Overall, I'm having a good experience, sometimes I had to call support. But they solved me all (or most) of my problems
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Good cloud storage and nowadays the offer a full year to students, which is great, you can store any file as you want, is easy to use and the support is very accurate, you can access on any device and share your files with everyone, plus, you can have a subscription with Gemini
cons: Google just gives you 15GB of storage... Basically giving you a time to eventually pay for it, That's not fair on the client side

review_title: Makes sharing files with a team seemless
author: Tiffany B.
pros: Google One has been an important asset to file sharing, cloud services, and file management. It’s easy for the team to download and use and compatible with a variety of devices.
cons: Sometimes the updates will make it not compatible with all of our team’s devices, which can put a snag in our schedule.

review_title: Simple and reliable cloud storage for everyday use
description: I use Google One mainly for storage, backups, and file sharing. It works smoothly across my phone and computer, and I rarely run into issues. The integration with other Google services makes it very convenient for daily use. It’s a solid option for individuals or small teams that need reliable cloud storage without complexity.
author: Alessandro P.
pros: Easy to set up and use across all devices. Storage expands quickly and integrates well with Google Drive, Gmail, and Photos. File sharing is straightforward, and backups (especially for photos and phone data) work automatically without much setup.
cons: Pricing can add up as storage needs grow. Limited advanced file management compared to more professional cloud solutions. Customer support is not always fast for basic plans.

review_title: Simple, Reliable Cloud Storage
description: Overall, Google One has been a dependable solution for cloud storage and device backups. It’s easy to use, integrates well with other Google services, and keeps my data accessible and secure. While not perfect, it’s a solid choice for anyone needing reliable storage.
author: Branko J.
pros: Google One makes managing cloud storage really easy. I like having all my files, photos, and backups in one place with seamless integration across devices. The additional storage options are flexible, and the sharing features with family members are convenient.
cons: The pricing can feel a bit high compared to some competitors, and the interface for managing backups isn’t always intuitive. The storage limit seems lower compared to competition too.

review_title: Overall two thumbs up
description: Overall it has a great value, easy file management, I'm also able to use it on multiple different devices and is easy to use.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It gives me the opportunity to save an incredible amount of storage so that I will not lose any of my files that are needed.
cons: To be honest there is nothing that I could say that would be a downgrade to the use of Google One...

review_title: Storage tool
description: Its ability to provide secure cloud storage and scalable plans further enhances efficiency and reduces the need for additional storage solutions, making it a cost-effective option for data management and accessibility.
author: Hannah M.
pros: Google One helped our organization centralize storage and manage files across different devices and users within a single platform, enabling a smooth workflow and efficient data organization. Its shared storage and backup features make it easier to store, access, and protect important data while ensuring availability when needed. The platform is user-friendly, making it easy for both employees and management to stay connected and organized.
cons: it supports automatic backups, file sharing, and seamless integration with other Google services, which help improve productivity and collaboration across teams.

review_title: Growing our online storage of educational materials.
description: This is something that I as a Language Instructor use to get a regular storage and share files with my students and colleagues easily. It offers a solid base to our education management, but the upper levels of storage can be seen as a considerable cost to a small team.
author: Blerta K.
pros: The ability to work across all the devices smoothly is a game changer as I can always have my lesson plans and student files in line so that they are available whenever I am in a classroom.
cons: Customer support is also very annoying to call regarding specific account problems and there is no advanced tagging of files to control large folders.

review_title: Great service
author: Chelsea S.
pros: Easy cloud backup, extra storage, family sharing, and useful perks like VPN and photo editing tools.
cons: Subscription cost adds up, storage fills fast, and some features feel limited or inconsistent. But overall not bad

review_title: Ottimo software di back up dati e per la conservazione nel tempo
description: Ottima e usufruisco dell'abbonamento a pagamento per conservare di tutto, di frequente in automatico.
author: Fabio L.
pros: La possibilità di archiviare automaticamente tutto ciò di cui necessito, in particolare file e foto e back up di talune applicazioni esterne
cons: E' ottimo in realtà e al pari di Google Drive: Offre un servizio di conservazione dati che assicura all'utente la possibilità di accedervi sempre nel tempo

review_title: Un des meilleurs service de stockage en ligne
description: Google One est un très bon service, qui permet d'augmenter la capacité de stockage de son compte Google à moindre cout. Certains avantages proposés et inclus sont cependant décevant, comme le support google qui ne parviens pas à être efficace. Le principal avantage de cet abonnement est qu'il s'intègre parfaitement à l'écosystème Google, car il en fait lui-même partie. La capacité Gmail ET Google Drive est alors augmentée, ce qui lui donne un atout majeur. C'est donc une très bonne expérience avec Google One !
author: Barnabé H.
pros: Google One permet d'obtenir du stockage supplémentaire sur son compte Google à moindre coût. Des avantages (100 Go, VPN, Support Google, Analyse des fuites de données…) intéressants ! Le tout à partir de 1.99€/mois. Il s'agit d'une supère offre, qui surpasse beaucoup d'offres concurrentes.
cons: Le support Google inclus dans l'abonnement est simplement décevant. Bien que les agents soient disponibles, le support par mail est très lent et ne semble jamais saisir le problème. De plus, il lui est impossible d'effectuer une quelconque action sur le compte, ce qui le rend peu utile.

review_title: Una gran innovación de Google
description: Guardar documentos en la nube y poder usarlos cuando se necesiten
author: Ernesto B.
pros: El producto en general cumple los criterios de Precio y optimización ya que está app ha pesar de ser muy barata implementa unas funciones geniales , como son el almacenamiento en la nube que no da alrededor de 100 GB por un precio súper barato y para mi es una de las mejores aplicaciones que se puede tener en un Movil hoy en día
cons: No le desagrada nada es perfecta en mi opinión.

review_title: Una Nube para gobernarlas a todas
author: Yosue V.
pros: Google One es una excelente herramienta de almacenamiento en nube que te permitirá tener acceso a almacenamiento seguro y rápido en tus dispositivos, permite realizar copias de seguridad, así como integraciones con otras herramientas de Google que lo hacen mucho más versátil que otras Nubes del mercado
cons: No hallo fallas en el servicio, puede que al inicio cueste un poco conocer la plataforma, pero en minutos ya lo puedes dominar

review_title: Say yes Google one
description: I love Google one, it's the best price thing out there
author: Cassandra S.
pros: You can't beat this low price, it's extremely affordable
cons: I can't think of anything that would make it better

review_title: Great backup option with multisystem compatibility
description: Very good.
author: Ahmed G.
pros: The things I really like about Google services are that they're always perfectly compatible with Mac, iPhone, Windows, Andorid, etc, so you do not need to be locked to a certain ecosystem to get the full experience. The other thing I always like is that the Google ecosystem integrates pretty well and always has this clean snbappy interface.
cons: I think the file sharing options need to be improved, I'd like to see an option to share actual copies of files within an email wihtout linking back to Google drive, same goes for the email client on the smartphone app. Also, a possibility of transferring sharing permissions when somebody has a personal Google account but you share a file with their business email address.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: All google products in one place
description: I can`t imagine working without Google one. There is no replacement of this in the market.
author: Somi S.
pros: I just love how we are able to have all of our google applications in one place with the help of Google one. It is super simple and easy to use. It makes us more efficient.
cons: I don`t have any problems with this software. It is perfect.

review_title: Google one e il suo ecosistema
description: Esperienza nel complesso più che positiva è che consiglio assolutamente di provare. Grazie a quest’app ho sicuramente una gestione ottimizzata di tutte le componenti di Google in un unica soluzione.
author: Pasquale I.
pros: Ormai è piu di un anno che uso Google One è questo sono le considerazioni al riguardo. Ciò che convince maggiormente è l'integrazione nativa: la gestione centralizzata dello spazio per Gmail, Drive e Foto rende l'esperienza d'uso fluida e priva di attriti, specialmente per chi usa Android, ma anche con Apple in questi anni c’è stata una buona ottimizzazione. Si apprezza molto i nuovi strumenti di editing basati su AI (come il Magic Editor illimitato) e i vantaggi extra, tra cui il cashback sul Google Store e le funzionalità avanzate per Google Meet.
cons: L’aspetto che meno mi è piaciuto e riguardante i backup. Bisogna fare attenzione a quali cartelle si impostano altrimenti c’è una sincronizzazione dei dati, anche di cartelle che possano occupare inutilmente la memoria e di interventi automatici che ogni tanto hanno bisogno di essere controllato poiché non avvenuti. Piani premium leggermente costosi(ovviamente in base al vostro utilizzo fare le proprie considerazioni al riguardo) rispetto agli entry-level.

review_title: Goolgle One
description: Serviço prático e útil para quem precisa mais espaço na nuvem e com boa integração com outros serviços do google
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Facilidade em ter espaço para armazenar num só local as minhas fotos, documentos e ficheiros e ter acesso a tudo nos meus dispositivos
cons: Um pouco mais caro que outros semelhantes e o apoio ao cliente um pouco lento, mas os aspetos positivos superam tudo isto

review_title: Storage simplification for content and creative teams.
description: As a marketing manager, I’m always juggling high-resolution images and video proofs. This service lets me expand my storage now with no IT involvement. Its saves your life if you need project files to be open on your phone, but managing thousands of assets can get messy.
author: Rajesh V.
pros: The fact that it automatically backs up all my devices, so I'm not out a clients graphic file if my computer crashes.
cons: Searching for specific old files is messy, and it would be easier with better tagging. Customer service has too often been like reading an operators manual instead of talking with a person.

review_title: Additional storage that makes my files available.
description: Google one has made me feel at ease since it has expanded my storage space, and hence, client files, scanned passports, and case files remain accessible to all my devices.
author: Brian Y.
pros: I prefer knowing that my files would automatically synchronize both on my phone and laptop, and I am therefore able to access the client files at any time without having to be afraid of not having enough disk space.
cons: I do not like how the support options are sometimes limited, and it still takes some manual investigations to know what is swallowing the storage.

review_title: Google One for Quality Storage Support.
description: Google One is the determined storage form, that makes us consider different sharing formations. The working with other google services makes us have an executive operational support.
author: Rejina R.
pros: Google One has adequate cloud space for all users. The extension of this storage space is simple, and very affordable.
cons: Google One has managed to remain helpful, a formation that makes storage reliable and accessible. The functioning of this app is ideal and remarkable.

review_title: Google rules
description: My overall experience is that it is great to organize your files and emails and the set up is very flexible
author: Cassandra J.
pros: What I like most about Google1 is that it gives more storage for you to hold videos photos and files and great to organize a timeline of events
cons: What I like least is that every month you have to pay a fee if not you lose your email if you can't pay for it

review_title: Clean up space will wipe your data
description: Well, based on the above detail, I cancelled my google one subscription. Instead I implemented my own good old file backup process, which never failed me on other devices. I urge everyone to never trust this function and never click on that "clean up space" button. When you loose your data, don't tell me I didn't warn you! 😊
author: Andrew B.
pros: It's a good offering, but implemented very badly. Could be especially useful for people with lesser abilities and time to make alternative arrangements.
cons: Specifically, the way "clean up space" feature is implemented. We store data locally, so we can access our favourite pics and photos any time, without being connected. By implementing it the way they did google developers just stripped us of this ability. What is done very badly (read, unprofessionally): 1/ when you click on it, there's no warning what's about to happen, e.g. all your data will be wiped from your device 2/ there's no 'stop' and 'undo' 3/ the worst part, google support told me sorry there's no way to get it back - again, unprofessional, because it's not true. 4/ I found a way to get my data back, but ONE FILE AT A TIME (no bulk restore). I wish I could charge google for 3 months worth of restoring work!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Valutazione complessiva di Google One
description: La mia esperienza con Google One è stata generalmente positiva. Il servizio offre un modo semplice e centralizzato per gestire lo spazio di archiviazione su Google Drive, Gmail e Google Photos, con backup automatici dei dispositivi e condivisione familiare senza complicazioni.
author: Vasil D.
pros: L’aumento dello spazio di archiviazione condiviso, utile per gestire file, foto e backup su più servizi come Google Drive, Google Photos e Gmail.
cons: Il costo ricorrente dell’abbonamento, che può diventare poco conveniente nel lungo periodo rispetto ad alternative.
